## What's new in this update

### Forge Sync improvements

_No commits since last build._

### Forge Tools improvements

- Added RTMTools (#1385)
- Renamed gameWon to isGameWon in RTMTools (#1386)
- Fixed Dual-Target Compatibility behavior (#1387)
- Added public read API to SessionFlowCelebrationEngine (#1393)
- Added UnsubscribeAllSheetModels() called in both OnClosed() (cleanup on (#1399)
- Fixed RTMTools.Commands behavior (#1400)
- Added GameMetadataAttribute (#1401)
- Fixed SystemTypePickerWindow (#1402)
- Added LuxeAvatarInitialsConverter, LuxeAvatarPresenceColorConverter (#1405)
- Added AutomationProperties (#1408)
- Fixed RTMRunHelper (#1410)
- The CleanupBeatTimer() method only cleans up beatResetTimer, leaving (#1411)
- Fixed Icon-only buttons are invisible to screen readers without an explicit (#1412)

_(+ 11 internal/noise commit(s) hidden)_

### Plugin improvements

_No commits since last build._
